params.TgtPrompt: Select up to X target creatures
params.SpellDescription: Up to X target creatures phase out. (While they're phased out, they're treated as though they don't exist. Each one phases in before its controller untaps during their next untap step.)
params.AnnounceTitle: how many blue cards to exile

remaining_params.AnnounceTitle: how many blue cards to exile

params.Description: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may exile any number of blue cards from your hand. This spell costs {2} less to cast for each card exiled this way.
